purpose: Manual mobile QA checklist before posting Finance Tracker publicly.
devices: Home Assistant Companion App on iOS, narrow phone viewport
Home Assistant Companion App on Android, narrow phone viewport
checks: Finance header is visible on mobile.
Hamburger menu opens the Home Assistant left sidebar.
Tabs scroll horizontally without pushing the page wider than the viewport.
Current Month cards do not overflow on long expense names.
Forms remain usable when the mobile keyboard is open.
Primary action buttons have at least a 44px touch target.
Bulk Import next-step guidance is readable on mobile.
Settings cleanup tools require confirmation dialogs.
Status badges remain legible in light and dark themes.
